Notice Of Hearing For Petition For Alternative Writ Of Mandamus
Off Calendar Dec-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MATTHEW MURILLO, Esq. of Law Offices of Paula Canny (Tel: 650-652-7862) for Petitioner Emma Abinanti-Sena;
Atty. AUSITN J. CATTERMOLE, Esq. of Office of the Attorney General of California (Tel: 510-879-0091) appearing for Respondent's Department of Motor Vehicles.

HEARING RE: PETITIONER EMMA ABINANRRI-SENA's Petition For Alternative Writ Of Mandamus.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
